execute_steps: code_review: Verified handleEvolve in commands.ts implements full analyze.py → Judge → suggestions → savePending flow

code_review: /evolve-apply action=apply + index applies single suggestion with backup via applySuggestion
code_review: handleEvolveApply calls appendHistory for each applied suggestion
code_review: savePending preserves unapproved suggestions (only status=pending filtered for apply)
